description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The exterior features large glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for abundant natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, as well as multiple outdoor patios and seating zones. The rear of the property showcases a private garden and terrace, while the front includes a driveway and a covered entrance. The structure is primarily composed of concrete, glass, and wood, with clean lines and minimalistic detailing. The overall design emphasizes functionality, comfort, and a strong connection to the surrounding outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large glass windows, open patios, and landscaped gardens, featuring clean lines and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, outdoor seating areas, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended driveway, additional patio spaces, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden, terrace, and secondary entrance with more outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, boundary wall, and the integration of outdoor and indoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with wide steps, large glass doors, and minimalistic detailing.
